title: Optimize Resume Summary
scenario: Write a resume summary for a Marketing Manager position that highlights the candidate's relevant experience, skills, and achievements. The summary should be no more than 150 words, use the present tense, and be tailored to a mid-level marketing job at a tech startup.
constraints: Must be specific to a mid-level marketing job at a tech startup

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the resume summary meets the length, tense, and job-specific requirements.
Evaluate the tone of the summary to ensure it is professional, enthusiastic, and showcases the candidate's expertise.
Assess if the summary includes relevant keywords from the marketing industry and the job description.
